fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

seo.title: Oregon Occupational Therapist License Reciprocity - How to Transfer Your License (2026)
seo.description: Already licensed as a occupational therapist? Here's whether your license transfers to Oregon - compact status, endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.
seo.keywords: occupational therapist license reciprocity oregon, how to transfer occupational therapist license to oregon, occupational therapist compact oregon, oregon occupational therapist endorsement application

board.name: Oregon Occupational Therapy Licensing Board
board.mailing_address:
Oregon Board of Occupational Therapy
3218 Pringle Road SE, Suite 230
Salem, OR 97302-6320

quick_facts.exam_name: National Board for Certification in Occupational Therapy (NBCOT)

license_types.title: Occupational Therapist Registered (OTR)
license_types.description: The standard credential to practice occupational therapy independently in Oregon.

license_types.title: Certified Occupational Therapy Assistant (COTA)
license_types.description: Requires an associate degree and practicing under the supervision of a licensed OTR.

steps.title: Register for an Account and Submit Application
steps.description: Create an account on the Oregon Board of Occupational Therapy's Online Licensing Application System (egov.oregon.gov/obls/licensing/) and complete the online application for initial licensure by exam or endorsement.

steps.title: Submit Official Transcripts
steps.description: Arrange for official transcripts, verifying graduation from an ACOTE-accredited occupational therapy program, to be sent directly to the Oregon Board of Occupational Therapy.

steps.title: Pass NBCOT Examination
steps.description: Successfully pass the National Board for Certification in Occupational Therapy (NBCOT) examination and request NBCOT to send official verification of your scores directly to the Oregon Board.

steps.title: Complete Oregon Jurisprudence Examination
steps.description: Access and complete the Oregon Jurisprudence Examination, an open-book online exam, through the Online Licensing Application System.

steps.title: Complete Fingerprint-Based Background Check
steps.description: Follow the instructions provided within the Online Licensing Application System to schedule and complete the required fingerprinting for a criminal background check.

documents.detail: Sent directly from your educational institution.
Official verification of passing the NBCOT exam.

provisional_text: Many states offer a limited permit or provisional license for new graduates waiting to take the NBCOT exam. Check specific board rules for supervisory requirements.
reciprocity_text: Occupational therapists licensed in another state can often apply via endorsement by providing license verification and current NBCOT certification.

faqs.question: How much does a Oregon OT license cost?
faqs.answer: The initial application and licensing fee varies, often around  to . Check the specific fee breakdown.

faqs.question: Is NBCOT certification required?
faqs.answer: Yes, passing the NBCOT exam is a standard requirement for initial licensure across all states.

faqs.question: Does Oregon have reciprocity for occupational therapists?
faqs.answer: No interstate compact currently covers occupational therapist practice in Oregon. To work in Oregon, apply for licensure by endorsement through the state board.

faqs.question: How long does it take to transfer my occupational therapist license to Oregon?
faqs.answer: Most endorsement applications take 4 to 6 Weeks.

faqs.question: Can I start working in Oregon while my endorsement application is processing?
faqs.answer: A temporary or provisional credential is available while the full endorsement application is pending.

reciprocity.notes: Occupational therapists licensed in another state can often apply via endorsement by providing license verification and current NBCOT certification.

hero.title: Become a Occupational Therapist in Oregon
hero.dek: To apply for an Occupational Therapist license in Oregon, create an account and apply through the Oregon Board of Occupational Therapy's Online Licensing Application System.
